# Benchmark Reports

Each report contains benchmark tables for one aggregation function.

| Aggregation | Report |
|-------------|--------|
| `sum` | [sum.md](sum.md) |
| `mean` | [mean.md](mean.md) |
| `median` | [median.md](median.md) |
| `prod` | [prod.md](prod.md) |
| `std` | [std.md](std.md) |
| `var` | [var.md](var.md) |
| `min` | [min.md](min.md) |
| `max` | [max.md](max.md) |
| `count` | [count.md](count.md) |
